text:
Disclaimer - San Mateo County Health
Skip to main content
Skip to site navigation
Disclaimer
General information
June 28, 2016
Endorsement Disclaimers
San Mateo County Health’s web site has links to other external
 sites, and in a few cases links to private organizations. You are
 subject to that site’s privacy policy when you leave our site.
Reference in this web site to any specific commercial products,
 process, service, manufacturer, or company does not constitute
 its endorsement or recommendation by San Mateo County Health. San
 Mateo County Health is not responsible for the contents of any
 “off-site” or external web page referenced from this server.
The intent of some parts of the website, including social media
 and streaming videos, is to highlight the work of our community
 partners and stakeholders and not every view expressed
 necessarily represents the official position of the County.
Pop-Up Advertisements
When visiting our Web site, your Web browser may produce pop-up
 advertisements. These advertisements were most likely produced by
 other Web sites you visited or by third party software installed
 on your computer. San Mateo County Health does not endorse
 or recommend products or services for which you may view a pop-up
 advertisement on your computer screen while visiting our site.
Copyright Statement
Copyright © 2012 County of San Mateo. All rights reserved.
All materials posted on this site are subject to copyrights owned
 by the County of San Mateo. Any reproduction, retransmissions, or
 republication of all or part of any document found on this site
 is expressly prohibited, unless explicitly granted by the County
 of San Mateo for the prior written consent to so reproduce,
 retransmit, or republish the material. All other rights reserved.
The names, trademarks, service marks and logos appearing on this
 website may not be used in any advertising or publicity, or
 otherwise to indicate San Mateo County Health’s sponsorship or
 affiliation with any product or service, without prior express
 written permission by San Mateo Health System.
Although the San Mateo County Health’s site includes “links”
 providing convenient direct access to other Internet sites, the
 County does not endorse, approve, certify or make warranties or
 representations as to the accuracy of the information on these
 sites.
San Mateo County Health will make reasonable efforts to include
 accurate and up-to-date information available to all users
 (following section 508 ADA guidelines) but makes no warranties or
 representations as to its accuracy. All users agree that all
 access and use of this website and the content thereof is at
 their own risk. Neither the County of San Mateo, nor any party
 involved in creating, producing or delivering information and
 material via this website, shall be liable for any direct,
 incidental, consequential, indirect, or punitive damages arising
 out of access to, use of or inability to use of this website, or
 any errors or omissions in the content thereof.
Opinion Poll
Any polls on San Mateo County Health website are not scientific.
 The polls reflect the opinions of only those Internet users who
 have chosen to participate in the poll and not the opinions of
 Internet users in general. San Mateo County is not responsible
 for the opinions expressed in the poll. This poll is not a
 substitute for professional medical advice and should not be used
 to diagnose or treat a health problem, disease or to prescribe
 any medication.
We do not collect personal information and we will not give,
 share, sell, or transfer any personal information that you
 voluntarily provide to us on our Opinion Poll, except to the
 extent that the County of San Mateo is required to do so pursuant
 to law, including, but not limited to, the California Public
 Records Act. IP addresses are automatically collected for the
 sole purpose of ensuring visitors have only one vote per poll. We
 do not give, share, sell or transfer IP addresses, except to the
 extent that we are required by law to do so.
